title: We're Going on a Bear Hunt Book

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
"over" on one switch 
"under" on the other
sections.middleText2: the book We're Going on a Bear Hunt by Michael Rosen

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Use switches to complete repeated lines of We're going on a Bear Hunt. 
2. Begin reading the book. 
3. Model switch use on the first repeated line "We can't go (over) it, we can't go (under) it, oh no we'll have to go through it!"
4. Continue reading and pause so the switch user can fill in the gap.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to say the repeated line in the book
